content: ffmpeg 16:9->9:16: crop=ih*9/16:ih centers crop (loses left/right of frame, speaker can be off-center), then scale=1080:1920. Cropping requires re-encode (-c:v libx264 -c:a aac); cannot -c copy. Burn captions: -vf subtitles=file.ass with force_style. Clean cuts: -ss BEFORE -i = fast but snaps to keyframe (clip starts early, mid-word) or garbled/black first frames with -c copy; -ss AFTER -i WITHOUT -c copy = frame-accurate re-encode (correct for clip extraction). For this app always re-encode and use output seeking for frame-accurate clean cuts.
